form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Most recently tried to lead throughout but was claimed late 2nd of 8 at Kilcoy Mdn-Sw on March 17 over 1200m, on a slow track; 0.9 len behind Sir Memphis carrying 58.5kg at $7. The race before that sat behind the speed prior to fading 8th of 12 at Beaudesert 4yo+ Mdn on February 6 over 1400m, 13 len behind Effie's Joy with 55.5kg at $16. Rates highly on the latest effort and can measure up.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Comes off a 59 day let-up. Before that sat on speed throughout when 3rd of 9 at Murwillumbah Mdn-Sw on February 1 over 1550m, 1.0 len behind Puligny with 59kg at $5.50. Will not find this easy. Can't have off that run.
